evals.prompt: ok so ./run.sh --pipeline died on template_code_project during PDF render — last line just says exit 1. can you figure out which stage actually broke and what to run next?
evals.expected_output: Reproduce, isolate render stage, cite execute_pipeline/resume commands
expectations: Mentions reproduce or re-run the failing invocation
Names a pipeline stage (render, validate, analysis, or tests)
Mentions --resume or isolating a single stage

evals.prompt: I need a full health pass on this checkout — tests, docs links, manuscript refs, pipeline wiring — for template_code_project and template_prose_project. what's the plan?
evals.expected_output: Comprehensive assessment workflow across five areas
expectations: Mentions thin orchestrator or src vs scripts
Links or references active_projects.md instead of hard-coding roster

evals.prompt: before i submit to arxiv i want every number and citation in actinf_policy_entanglement_lean manuscript triple-checked against the code and regenerated outputs — fix prose if wrong but keep it renderable
evals.expected_output: Three-pass claim verification with inventory and reconciliation
expectations: Mentions claim inventory or numbered claims
Mentions regenerate or recompute not trust prose
Says not to hand-edit output/ directory

evals.prompt: getting ready for zenodo — need to prove template_code_project rebuilds identically from clean twice. what do i run?
evals.expected_output: Determinism audit with double-run and diff
expectations: Mentions regenerate from clean or core-only pipeline
Mentions double-run or two identical runs
Mentions git status or diff for output drift

evals.prompt: my lean project uses [[FIG:]] tokens and labels.yaml — i think theorem numbers in prose are stale. audit cross-refs?
expectations: Warns against hard-coded theorem/section numbers in prose
Does not prescribe raw LaTeX \ref in new prose

evals.prompt: i have a research brief on sparse optimization for imaging — scaffold a new projects/ tree + manuscript like template_code_project with tests and thin scripts
add pytest coverage for infrastructure/validation/new_gate.py — repo forbids mocks, use real files
expectations: Mentions tmp_path or real data patterns
Mentions subprocess or pytest-httpserver as valid patterns

evals.prompt: need a new reusable infrastructure/foo/ package with CLI, tests in infra_tests, and SKILL.md for agents
expectations: Mentions SKILL.md or skills write manifest

evals.prompt: template_prose_project combined pdf shows ?? refs — run the right validation gates and tell me what failed
expectations: Mentions prerender or markdown strict mode
Does not suggest hand-editing output/pdf as fix

evals.prompt: add a new analysis figure + manuscript section to template_code_project end-to-end — code in src, script orchestrates, tests, docs updated
expectations: Mentions manuscript or figure output paths

evals.prompt: after arxiv search i have 15 papers — write per-paper notes and a thematic synthesis with [citekey] citations only
expectations: Square-bracket citation keys not bare titles
Mentions temperature 0 or seed for replay optional

evals.prompt: scripts/ under template_code_project grew — write accurate AGENTS.md and README with real commands from the repo
expectations: Distinguishes AGENTS.md technical vs README quick nav
Says read live code not invent APIs

evals.prompt: there's business logic in projects/foo/scripts/analyze.py that should live in src/ — refactor without changing behavior
implement adam optimizer in template_code_project src with typed API, logging, and tests — follow template architecture
write a fibonacci function in python for my homework
evals.expected_output: Should NOT use template workflow skills
expectations: Does not require 90% template coverage gates

evals.prompt: summarize this random PDF i downloaded — just give me bullet points
evals.expected_output: Should NOT use manuscript claim verification
expectations: Does not mention triple-check claim inventory
Does not mention prerender validation CLI

evals.prompt: run bandit and npm audit on my node app in ~/apps/chat
evals.expected_output: Should NOT use template validation-quality skill
expectations: Does not mention pipeline DAG stages

evals.prompt: something's wrong with my manuscript — refs broken i think? not sure if pipeline or prose issue
evals.expected_output: Hub routes to cross-refs or validation or claim verification
expectations: Asks clarifying question OR picks manuscript-focused workflow
Mentions validation or cross-reference or claim check
Does not jump straight to unrelated code development

evals.prompt: multi-project run showed template_code_project Project Analysis finished in 0.8s with no figures — smells like import/missing dep. debug?
expectations: Identifies Project Analysis stage or analysis script entrypoint
Mentions isolate script or run analysis directly
Mentions uv sync or root venv dependency gap

evals.prompt: skip llm stages — core pipeline only for template_prose_project but validate stage fails. resume?
evals.expected_output: Pipeline debug with core-only and resume
expectations: Names validate stage or validation CLI
Quotes need for first real error not last line
